zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Appleyard於1393年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可登斯頓時，她的父親Sir William Appleyard33歲，母親Lady Margaret Clere18歲。她於1409年與Sir Thomas Jernegan在英國英格蘭素福爾可索莫利頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1450年在英國英格蘭享年57歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可索莫利頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Appleyard于1393年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可登斯頓时，她的父亲Sir William Appleyard33岁，母亲Lady Margaret Clere18岁。她于1409年与Sir Thomas Jernegan在英国英格兰素福爾可索莫利頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1450年在英国英格兰享年57岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可索莫利頓。

nameMeanings.name: Appleyard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): topographic name for someone who lived by an apple orchard, Middle English appleyard, or a habitational name from Appleyard in Yorkshire with the same etymology. There are several places called with this term, of which the most significant as a source of surnames is in Yorkshire. It is also an Americanized form of Applegarth , which in Scandinavian-speaking areas replaced the native Appleton .

variants.name: Applegarth
meanings: English (northern) and Scottish: topographic name from northern Middle English applegarth ‘apple orchard’ (Old Norse apaldr ‘apple tree’ + garthr ‘enclosure’), or a habitational name from a place so named, of which there are examples in Cumbria and North and East Yorkshire, as well as in the county of Dumfries.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Appleyard was born in 1393, in Dunston, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William Appleyard, was 33 and her mother, Lady Margaret Clere, was 18. She married Sir Thomas Jernegan in 1409, in Somerleyton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1450, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57, and was buried in Somerleyton, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Appleyard est née en 1393, à Dunston, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Appleyard, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Clere, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Jernegan en 1409, à Somerleyton, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1450, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Somerleyton, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Appleyard 1393 in Dunston, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Appleyard 33 und ihre Mutter Lady Margaret Clere 18. Sie hat 1409 in Somerleyton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas Jernegan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1450 im Alter von 57 Jahren in England, United Kingdom und wurde in Somerleyton, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Appleyard è nata il nel 1393 nel Dunston, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir William Appleyard, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Lady Margaret Clere, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Jernegan nel 1409, nel Somerleyton, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1450, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolta a Somerleyton, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Appleyardが1393年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクダンストンで生まれた時，父Sir William Appleyardは33歳，母Lady Margaret Clereは18歳であった。1409年にイギリスイギリススフォルクソメルリートンでSir Thomas Jerneganと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1450年にイギリスイギリスで57歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクソメルリートンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Appleyard(이)가 1393년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 던스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Appleyard(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret Clere(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1409년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 서머리턴에서 Sir Thomas Jernegan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1450년 영국 잉글랜드에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 서머리턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Appleyard nasceu em 1393, em Dunston, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Appleyard, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Clere, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Jernegan em 1409, em Somerleyton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1450, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em Somerleyton, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Appleyard родилась в 1393 г. в местности дунстон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William Appleyard было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Clere, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Jernegan в 1409 г. в местности сомирлитон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1450 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности сомирлитон, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Appleyard nació en 1393, en Dunston, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William Appleyard, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Clere, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Jernegan en 1409, en Somerleyton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1450, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultada en Somerleyton, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
